# Miximus Copilot instructions

The canonical repository instructions are in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Read that file first, then follow its links and any nearer subsystem `AGENTS.md` that applies to the files being changed.

Detailed project guides:

- [Architecture](../docs/architecture.md)
- [GPU and media](../docs/gpu-and-media.md)
- [Development](../docs/development.md)

Keep native and web definitions synchronized, preserve render-thread/OpenGL ownership rules, and run the validation commands specified by `AGENTS.md` before completing changes.
